tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.mock_crop_data() → CropData
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_uptake_nutrient(depths: list[float], nutrients: list[float], mocker: MockerFixture, mock_crop_data: CropData) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_shift_nutrient_time(old: float | None, new: float, mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Ensure shift_nutrient_time correctly copies current nutrient value to previous_nutrient.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_uptake_main_process(phosphates: list[float], depths: list[float], gate: bool, mocker: MockerFixture, mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Check that incorporate_phosphorus() correctly called functions and variables were updated as expected.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_potential_nutrient_uptake(optimal: float, previous: float, mature: float, max_growth: float) → None

Test that potential nutrient uptake is correctly calculated by determine_potential_nutrient_uptake().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_layer_extracted_resource(reqs: list[float], srcs: list[float]) → None

Ensure that extracted nutrient is correctly calculated for each layer.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_layer_extracted_resource_error(reqs: list[float], srcs: list[float], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Ensure that extracted nutrient is correctly calculated for each layer.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_extracted_resource(requested: float, available: float) → None

Ensure that extracted resource is correctly calculated by determine_extracted_resource().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_find_deepest_accessible_soil_layer(root_depth: float, depths: list[float], expect: list[float], mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Ensure that layers are partitioned correctly by determine_deepest_accessible_soil_layer.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_deepest_accessible_layer(root: float, depths: list[float], expect: float) → None

Test that the deepest soil layer that is accessible to roots is correctly calculated by _determine_deepest_accessible_layer().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_access_layers(deepest: int, layers: list[float], mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Check that soil layers are accessed correctly with access_layers().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_error_determine_deepest_accessible_layer(root: float, depths: list[float], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Check that the errors were raised for specific cases.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_layer_nutrient_uptake_potential(bounds: list[float], demand: float, root_depth: float, ndistro: float) → None

Ensure potential nutrient uptake is calculated correctly for each soil layer with determine_layer_nutrient_potential().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_error_determine_layer_nutrient_uptake_potential(bounds: list[float], demand: float, root_depth: float, ndistro: float, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Check that determine_layer_nutrient_potential throws an error when soil boundaries are not properly ordered.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_nutrient_uptake_to_depth(demand: float, depth: float, root_depth: float, ndistro: float) → None

Check that nutrient uptake is correctly calculated by determine_surface_nutrient_uptake().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_error_determine_nutrient_uptake_to_depth(demand: float, depth: float, root_depth: float, ndistro: float, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Check that errors are appropriately thrown for determine_surface_nitrogen_uptake().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_extract_nutrient_from_soil_layers(uptakes: list[float], nutrients: list[float], mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Check the nutrient is correctly extracted from soil layers with the function extract_nutrient_from_soil_layers().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_extend_nutrient_uptakes_to_full_profile(missed: int, uptakes: list[float], expect: list[float], mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Check that the correct number of zeros are padded to uptakes by extend_nutrient_uptakes_to_full_profile().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_nutrient_shape_parameters(halfheat: float, heatfrac: float, emerge: float, half: float, near: float, mature: float, should_fail: bool, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Check that the shape parameters are correctly calculated by determine_nshapes() and that errors were raised correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_shape_log(heatfrac: float, current: float, mature: float, emergence: float) → None

Check that determine_shape_log() calculates correct output.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_error_determine_shape_log(heatfrac: float, current: float, mature: float, emergence: float, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Check that determine_shape_log() throws errors when appropriate.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_optimal_nutrient_fraction(heatfrac: float, emerge: float, mature: float, shape1: float, shape2: float) → None

Ensure that nutrient fraction is correctly calculated by determine_optimal_nutrient_fraction().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_optimal_nutrient(nfrac: float, biomass: float) → None

Test that optimal nutrient is correctly calculated by determine_optimal_nutrient().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_stored_nutrient(prev: float, new: float, fix: float) → None

Test the stored nutrient is properly calculated by determine_stored_nutrient().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_layer_nutrient_uptake(demand: list[float], potential: list[float], nitrate: list[float]) → None

Test that actual nutrient uptake from each layer is properly calculated by determine_layer_nitrogen_uptake().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_non_water_uptake.test_determine_layer_nutrient_uptake_error(demand: list[float], potential: list[float], nitrate: list[float], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that error from determine_layer_nitrogen_uptake() was accuratellt .
